styles.input: w-full border-syntax-comment bg-bg-base text-syntax-variable placeholder:text-zinc-400 text-lg py-5 px-4 rounded-lg focus:border-syntax-operator focus:ring-1 focus:ring-syntax-operator transition-all duration-300 shadow-inner
styles.itemActive: py-2 px-4 rounded-md flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer transition-all duration-150 bg-syntax-comment text-syntax-variable shadow-sm
styles.itemInactive: py-2 px-4 rounded-md flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer transition-all duration-150 bg-transparent hover:bg-syntax-comment/40 text-syntax-variable
styles.itemSubtitleActive: text-xs font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded transition-colors duration-150 text-syntax-constant bg-bg-base
styles.itemSubtitleInactive: text-xs font-mono px-2 py-0.5 rounded transition-colors duration-150 text-syntax-peach bg-syntax-comment border border-transparent
